content.problemStatement:
Jagdish Bhagat bolta hai... Gav se gav jod diya hai...

The government is very upset with Mr. Bhagat's feedback and decided to directly connect every single pair of villages. Help the government solve this in minimum number of days.

Aryan has NNN **pairwise distinct** points lying on the coordinate axes, i.e, every point is of the form (x,0)(x, 0)(x,0) or (0,y)(0, y)(0,y). Aryan wants to draw line segments connecting every pair of the given points.

In one second, Aryan can draw line segments between as many pairs of points as he likes, as long as all the segments drawn **in this second** do not intersect or overlap non-trivially with each other; however, it is allowed for the endpoint of one segment to touch another segment.

That is, if two segments share a point, then that point **must** be the endpoint of at least one of the two segments. See the sample cases below for an example.

For example, Aryan cannot draw a segment joining (1,0)(1, 0)(1,0) to (0,2)(0, 2)(0,2) and a segment joining (2,0)(2, 0)(2,0) and (0,1)(0, 1)(0,1) in the same second, since they intersect. However, he can draw segments (0,1)‚àí(2,0),(0,0)‚àí(0,2)(0, 1)-(2, 0), (0, 0)-(0, 2)(0,1)‚àí(2,0),(0,0)‚àí(0,2) and (0,1)‚àí(1,0)(0, 1)-(1, 0)(0,1)‚àí(1,0) in the same second, since they only touch at an endpoint.

Find the minimum number of seconds Aryan needs to draw all the (N2)\binom{N}{2}(2N‚Äã) line segments.

Note that **every possible** line segment **must** be drawn. That is, if you had the points {(‚àí1,0),(0,0),(1,0)}\{(-1, 0), (0, 0), (1, 0)\}{(‚àí1,0),(0,0),(1,0)}, then all three pairs of line segments must be drawn ‚Äî it is not enough to draw the segment (‚àí1,0)‚àí(1,0)(-1, 0) - (1, 0)(‚àí1,0)‚àí(1,0).


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of testcases.
Each testcase consists of multiple lines of input.

The first line of each testcase contains a single integer NNN ‚Äî the number of points on the coordinate axes.
Each of the next NNN lines contains two space-separated integers xxx and yyy, denoting the point (x,y)(x, y)(x,y). It is guaranteed that at least one of xxx and yyy will be 000.




Output Format
For each testcase, output on a single line the minimum number of seconds Aryan needs to draw line segment between every pair of points.
constraints: Every input point will lie on the coordinate axes.
The input points are pairwise distinct.
The sum of NNN across all the testcases won't exceed 10610^6106.
